name: Business Email Finder
description: Takes a business type and location, uses Exa to find relevant businesses, Firecrawl to scrape their websites for contact information, and Claude AI to extract and qualify email addresses with business context. Saves qualified leads to Google Sheets.

source.originalName: Scrape business emails from Google Maps without the use of any third party APIs

businessType.description: Type of business to find (e.g. 'dentist', 'restaurant', 'plumber', 'real estate agent')

location.description: City, region, or area to search (e.g. 'Austin, TX', 'London, UK')

maxResults.description: Maximum number of businesses to scrape (1-20)

steps.name: Select unique business URLs to scrape
Scrape business websites for contact info
Compile scraped data for Claude analysis
Build Claude prompt for email extraction and qualification
Run Claude AI to extract and qualify emails
Strip code fences and parse Claude JSON output
Build Google Sheets data from extracted leads
